item.title:
RacingPost: Racing Post @RacingPost · 9min ‘You've got to win in here before you can win out there’
Skelton takes another victory
item.description:
Racing Post @RacingPost · 9min ‘You've got to win in here before you can win out there’
Skelton takes another victory in the ring with £435,000 Tattersalls Cheltenham April record De racingpost.com 1 658
